name: NIST Special Database 2 and NIST Special Database 6
provider: National Institute of Standards and Technology
license: NIST free reference data; review source terms before production use.
availability_note: Public NIST structured-form reference sets with simulated tax submissions, form images, and answer files.

demo_sample_source.name: US Tax Forms Donut Dataset derived from NIST-SD2

download_hint: Download the Special Database 2 or 6 ZIP from NIST, then point document_sources.folder_path at an extracted submission folder.
